title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 89.420 - Commission to approve plats, when
text:
89.420.  Commission to approve plats, when. — Within sixty days after the submission of a plat to the commission, the commission shall approve or disapprove the plat; otherwise the plat is deemed approved by the commission, except that the commission, with the consent of the applicant for the approval, may extend the sixty-day period.  The ground of disapproval of any plat by the commission shall be made a matter of record.
(L. 1963 p. 146 § 13)
